name: Restriction enzyme seed references
sourceName: NEB recognition specificity list and REBASE literature
licenseOrRedistributionNote: Small curated seed set of common enzyme names, recognition sites, and cut positions. Review source terms before importing full upstream restriction-enzyme databases.
assumptions: Records intentionally focus on common Type II enzymes with simple single-site recognition patterns.
Cut positions are stored as offsets after bases in the listed recognition sequence.
The first SMS3 scanner treats these records as browser-bundled references and reports direct-strand coordinates.
